title: Search and Routing Tuning
description: Coordination parent for continuity research packets focused on search-pipeline empirical tuning and reranking optimization. The root research packet investigates hardcoded thresholds, weighted fusion, FSRS decay constants, reranker-provider trade-offs, cross-encoder length-penalty behavior, and cache-TTL throughput impact across the vector, BM25, FTS5, and reranking stages, with the intent of producing implementation-ready parameter recommendations rather than speculative theory.
